analyst_note: Main claim: "the aim of achieving science-based net zero ... to achieve net zero by 2045" (AstraZeneca_AR_2025.pdf, p9). SBTi: Targets set, 1.5°C near-term target (FY2030). 8-Test: 0 PARTIAL, 0 FAIL, 0 MISSING -> PASS. Pharma annual report. Strong climate disclosure — SBTi-verified Net-Zero-Standard targets, 98% near-term absolute target on a 2015 baseline, independent sustainability assurance. One MED (assurance level). NOTE: a 2025 China legal...
